verse_text: But when the kindness and the love of God our Savior toward man appeared,

links.context: Adoption as a child of God is not a matter of ethnic descent (of blood) as it was in the OT; nor are we children of God simply by natural birth (the will of the flesh), nor by man's own decision (the will of man). Becoming a child of God is a spiritual birth by grace, through faith, and in the Holy Spirit. This is accomplished and manifested in the sacrament of Holy Baptism (3:5-8; see [[TIT.3:4]]-7).

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
